critic_raw:
## Critique (Multiround Run 3): MRR@10 vs Recall@10

MRR@10 measures rank of first relevant article. Recall@10 measures coverage within top 10. For a support agent browsing a top-10 list, coverage is the operational objective. Recall@10 should be primary.
defender_raw:
## Defense (Multiround Run 3): Concede

Recall@10 aligns better with the browsing-window objective.
